feature: Deep Gap Sprint 8 — Remaining MISSING Features
requirement: Indices, entity permissions, instrument folders, warnings system

tasks.title: Indices + entity permissions + folders + warnings
tasks.description:
Implement 4 remaining MISSING features.

Part A — Real-time index calculation:
APPEND to types.go: Index struct (ID, Name, InstrumentWeights map[string]float64, BaseValue float64, CurrentValue float64, ChangePercent float64, LastCalculatedAt, CreatedAt — json tags)
APPEND to store.go: IndexStore (Create, Get, List, Update, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_index.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/indices — create index with instrument weights
- GET /api/v1/securities/indices — list all indices with current values
- GET /api/v1/securities/indices/{id} — get with current value
- POST /api/v1/securities/indices/{id}/calculate — recalculate: for each instrument in weights, get latest trade price from tradeStore, multiply by weight, sum → new CurrentValue. Calculate ChangePercent from BaseValue.
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/indices/{id}

Part B — Exchange Manager entity permissions:
APPEND to types.go: EntityPermission struct (ID, RoleID, EntityType string, AllowCreate bool, AllowView bool, AllowEdit bool, AllowDelete bool, AllowApprove bool — json tags)
APPEND to store.go: EntityPermissionStore (Set, Get(roleID, entityType), ListByRole, Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_entity_permission.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/entity-permissions?role_id= — list permissions by role
- PUT /api/v1/securities/entity-permissions — set permission {role_id, entity_type, allow_create, allow_view, etc.}
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/entity-permissions/{role_id}/{entity_type}

Part C — Instrument folders:
APPEND to types.go: Folder struct (ID, ParentID string, Name, CreatedAt — json tags)
Add FolderID string to Instrument.
APPEND to store.go: FolderStore (Create, Get, List, ListChildren(parentID), Delete) + InMemory
Create handlers_folder.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/folders — create {name, parent_id?}
- GET /api/v1/securities/folders — list all (flat)
- GET /api/v1/securities/folders/{id}/children — list children
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/folders/{id}

Part D — Warnings system:
APPEND to types.go: Warning struct (ID, WarningType string, EntityType, EntityID, Message, Severity string LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH, AcknowledgedBy, CreatedAt — json tags)
WarningType constants: WARN_DELETE_ACTIVE, WARN_HALT_DURING_AUCTION, WARN_LARGE_ORDER, WARN_CIRCUIT_BREAKER_CHANGE, WARN_ROLE_DELETION
APPEND to store.go: WarningStore (Create, List, Acknowledge(id, userID)) + InMemory
Create handlers_warning.go:
- GET /api/v1/securities/warnings — list (optional ?acknowledged=false)
- POST /api/v1/securities/warnings/{id}/acknowledge
Wire into key handlers: before deleting active instrument → create warning. Before halting during auction → create warning.

Update server.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for Sprint 8
tasks.description:
Write tests for indices, entity permissions, folders, warnings.

1. store_test.go:
- TestIndexStore_CRUD
- TestEntityPermissionStore_SetGet_ListByRole
- TestFolderStore_Create_ListChildren
- TestWarningStore_Create_List_Acknowledge

2. Handler tests:
- handlers_index_test.go: TestCreateIndex, TestCalculateIndex, TestListIndices
- handlers_entity_permission_test.go: TestSetEntityPermission, TestListByRole
- handlers_folder_test.go: TestCreateFolder, TestListChildren
- handlers_warning_test.go: TestListWarnings, TestAcknowledgeWarning

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
